caption: The video features a woman with short black hair and glasses, wearing a light green top with floral embroidery. She is seated against a plain black background, which helps to focus attention on her. The woman appears to be speaking or presenting, as indicated by her hand gestures and the microphone clipped to her shirt. Her expression changes slightly between the frames, suggesting she is engaged in explaining or discussing a topic. The setting seems formal, possibly an educational or professional presentation, given the logo "NPTEL" visible in the corner of the screen.
